events.description: Initial chatbot platform with n8n, Chatwoot, Rasa, Qdrant
Intelligent quotation system with AI, WhatsApp, Google Sheets
Forked from bmc-cotizacion-inteligente (same initial commit hash: 4f2720a2)
Added autonomous agents, documentation maintainer, quality auditor, health monitor
WhatsApp integration, cloud agent daily, training system, audio transcription
Deployment attempts, performance workflows, security
Final activity — repo goes stale after this
Knowledge consolidation, k8s configs, AI agents architecture, backup system
Monorepo consolidation attempt with ingested apps and CI/CD
Architecture docs, ADRs, agent registry, Turborepo, workflows. Nested copy issues.
Final commit 'all' — repo goes latent
Merge conflicts resolution — repo stalls
Knowledge governance: GPT configurations, truth base, training systems
Local-only prototype with Claude Code docs (3 commits total)
Auto-approve workflow — repo goes legacy
Core GPT repo with pricing master, accessories catalog, BOM rules, EVOLUCIONADOR
Google Gemini port experiment (17 files, 17 commits in 1 day)
PR consolidation — 51 commits in 2 days, then stops
v3.0 initial release — React/Vite calculator
v3.1.0: API endpoints, OpenAPI spec, Cloud Run deployment, MercadoLibre OAuth
Isolated GPT config with Wolf workflow, manual gates, autopilot engine
GPT quotation tracking, PDF generation, Google Drive integration. 92 commits.

chatbot_line.path: ChatBOT (Oct 2025) → bmc-cotizacion-inteligente (Oct 2025) → chatbot-2311 (forked Oct 2025, evolved Nov-Dec 2025)
chatbot_line.note: chatbot-2311 is a direct fork of bmc-cotizacion-inteligente that evolved far beyond it (167 vs 40 commits). Both share the same first commit hash.
chatbot_line.current_status: ChatBOT = latent platform, chatbot-2311 = legacy, bmc-cotizacion = stale

gpt_panelin_line.note: GPT instructions evolved from static KB-based (Truth-base) to Code Interpreter (GPT-PANELIN) to API-action based (Calculadora-BMC-GPT)

calculator_line.note: Calculator started as a Python script in GPT-PANELIN, then became a full React+Express app

consolidation_attempts.note: 152 commits in January but stalled with merge conflicts and nested copies. Never completed consolidation.
consolidation_attempts.current_status: Stalled — but has valuable patterns (ADRs, agent registry, Turborepo)

repos: aistudioPAnelin (17 commits in 1 day, Gemini port)

gpt_instruction_evolution.description: How the GPT system prompt evolved across 3 generations

generations.approach: Static KB-based — GPT reads JSON files and does calculations itself
generations.iva_handling: Prices already include IVA 22%, don't add more
unique_features: Core behavior rules (Always be serviceable, Honesty radical)
Escalation protocol (collect contact → promise callback at 9am)

generations.approach: Code Interpreter — GPT uses Python for calculations and PDF generation
generations.kb_hierarchy: 7 levels (Master → Accessories → BOM → Pricing optimized → Catalog → Validation → Dynamic → Support)
generations.iva_handling: Prices already include IVA 22%, don't add more
unique_features: Advanced analysis capabilities (pattern recognition, cost optimization)

generations.approach: API-action mode — GPT calls calculator API for all calculations
generations.iva_handling: Subtotal sin IVA + IVA 22% + total final (aligned with calculator)
unique_features: Real API integration via OpenAPI actions
Wolf workflow for lead/quote persistence (Sheets, Drive)
Manual gates protocol for commercial approval
Decision tree (INTAKE → QUALIFY → QUOTE → PERSIST → APPROVE)
features_lost_from_previous: Core behavior rules (Always be serviceable, Honesty radical, No-ego)

rescue_recommendations.reason: Sets commercial philosophy — differentiates from generic calculator
Builds rapport with team members, makes GPT feel custom-built
Critical for production — prevents dead-end conversations
Quality control mechanism before responding to customers
Power user shortcuts — useful for internal team
Unique capability for internal team development
Prevents user frustration — small but useful
Positions GPT as engineer/consultant, not just calculator

calculator_model.approach: All prices SIN IVA. IVA 22% applied ONCE at the end by calcTotalesSinIVA()
calculator_model.example: ISODEC EPS 100mm: venta=37.76, web=45.97, costo=33.93 (all sin IVA)

gpt_kb_model.approach: MIXED — bromyros has both sin/con IVA fields, accessories has prices CON IVA

price_discrepancies.note: Calculator has distinct venta/web prices; GPT KB has same price for both

pricing_analysis.recommendation: constants.js should be PRIMARY source. GPT should call API for pricing instead of using KB files. Current GPT instructions (Calculadora-BMC-GPT) already do this via obtener_catalogo action.

GPT-PANELIN-V3.2.note: Mostly copilot/codex auto-generated. Recent: autopilot consolidation plan PRs.

chatbot-2311.note: Stale — auto-approve workflow, submodule fixes, CVE fixes

2026_Mono_rep.note: CI configuration, PR handling, stale monorepo attempts

bmc-cotizacion-inteligente.note: Stale — includes 'Find flights to Buenos Aires' (unrelated)

open_prs_analysis.recommendation: Close stale PRs in archived/legacy repos. Only Calculadora-BMC and Calculadora-BMC-GPT should have active PR management.

abandoned_repos.reason: Local-only experiment, Claude Code docs dump
One-day Gemini experiment, merge strategy never executed

migration_patterns.description: chatbot-2311 forked from bmc-cotizacion and evolved 4x more (167 vs 40 commits)
GPT config extracted from the monolithic GPT-PANELIN repo into focused config repo
Python calculation script evolved into full web application
Attempted monorepo consolidation (152 commits) but stalled at merge conflicts
